rdf:Description.dc:publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft,

rdf:Description.dcterms:hasPart: Opening Instructions and Prayer of Thanksgiving
Readings from Mazmura Dāwit
Prayer of Daniel and Praise of Azariah
Prayer of Our Lady Mary, ጸሎት፡ ዘእግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡
Prayer of Simon, the Prophet
Prayer of Incense, ጸሎተ፡ ዕጣን። Published in Ethiopia, ጸሎተ፡ ዕጣን። (Addis Ababa: Tǝnśa’e Zä-Guba’e, 1951 EC)
Words of Comfort, በእንተ፡ ቃለ፡ መፍትው፡
Benediction for the Hours, አንብሮ፡ እድ፡
Prayer of Incense, ጸሎተ፡ ዕጣን፡, continued
Prayer for the Departed at the Time of Death, አርእስተ፡ ምንባብ፡ ዘይትነበብ፡ በላዕለ፡ ምውታን፡ በጊዜ፡ ፀዓተ፡ ነፍስ፡
Prayer for the Passing of the Soul, ጸሎት፡ በእንተ፡ ማኅለፍተ፡ ነፍስ፡
Admonitions for the Time of Wrapping the Body in Burial, ተግሣጽ፡ ዘይትነበብ፡ በጊዜ፡ ግንዘት፡ በላዕለ፡ ሙታን።
Reading after the Preparation for Burial, ሥርዓት፡ ዘይትነበብ፡ ላዕለ፡ ሙታን፡ እምድኅረ፡ ግንዘት፡
Prayer of Our Lady Mary, ጸሎት፡ ዘእግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡
Prayer for men who died during Passion Week, ዘይትነበብ፡ በላዕለ፡ ሙታን። ሶበ፡ ይመውቱ፡ ዕደው፡ በሰሙነ፡ ሕማማት፡
Prayer for women who died during Passion Week, ሶበ፡ ይመውታ፡ አንስት፡ በሰሙነ፡ ሕማማት፡
The Prayer of Athanasius for the Passing of the Soul, ቃለ፡ አትናቴዎስ።
The Book that Came from Jerusalem, መጽሐፍ፡ ዘወፅአት፡ እምኢየሩሳሌም፡
The Book that Came from Jerusalem, Part 2
Processional Ritual [for Departed Priests]:
Station One: Prayer when the body comes out of the house, ምዕራፈ፡ ካህናት፡
Station Two: Funeral Processional Priest On the Way to the Church, ዘፍኖት፡
Station Three: On the Way to the Church
Station Four: On the Way to the Church
Station Five: On the Way to the Church
Station Six
Station Seven: When the Body Arrives at the Church and to the place of Burial
Processional Ritual for Departed Deacon
Station One: Prayer when the body comes out of the house
Station Two
Station Three
Station Four
Station Five [at the church]
Funeral Ritual for Departed Men, ፍትሐት፡ ዘአበው፡ መሃይምናን፡
Funeral Ritual for Departed Children, ፍትሐት፡ ዘይትነበብ፡ በላዕለ፡ ሕፃናት፡
Funeral Ritual for Departed Women, ፍትሐት፡ ዘዓንስት፡ ዓበይት፡
Funeral Ritual for Departed Girls, ፍትሐት፡ ላዕለ፡ ዓዋልድ፡ ንዑሳት፡
Ritual for Burial, ፍትሐት፡ ዘግብአተ፡ መሬት፡
General Funeral Rituals of Remembrance from the Second Day up to the Fortieth Day, ፍትሐት፡ ዘይትነበብ፡ እምካልዕ፡ ዕለት፡ እስከ፡ ፵ ዕለት።
Funeral Rituals of Remembrance for the Third Day, ፍትሐት፡ ዘይትነበብ፡ በ፫፡ዕለት፡
Funeral Rituals of Remembrance for the Seventh Day, ፍትሐት፡ ዘይትነበብ፡ በ፯ ዕለት፡
Funeral Rituals of Remembrance for the Twelfth Day, ፍትሐት፡ ዘይትነበብ፡ በ፲ወ፪ ዕለት፡
Funeral Rituals of Remembrance for the Thirtieth Day, ፍትሐት፡ ዘይትነበብ፡ በ፴ ዕለት፡

Funeral Rituals of Remembrance for the Fortieth, Sixtieth, and Eighieth Days, Half Year and Yearly Anniversary of the Departed, ፍትሐት፡ ዘይትነበብ፡ በተፍጻሜተ፡ ፵[፡] ወበ፷[፡] ወበ፹[፡] ዕለት፡ ወበመንፈቅ፡ ወበዓመት። ወበኲሉ፡ ተዝካረ፡ ሙታን።
Homily of Jacob of Sǝrug for Departed Priests and Deacons, ድርሳን፡ ዘብፁዕ፡ ወቅዱስ፡ ያዕቆብ፡ ዘሥሩግ፡
Funeral Rituals of Remembrance, continued
Homily from One of the Brothers, ዜና፡ መፍትው፡ እምአኃው፡
A Second Homily from One of the Brothers, ዜና፡ መፍትው፡ እምአኃው፡
Prayer for all the Departed
A Second Prayer of Our Lady Mary, ካልዕ፡ ጸሎት፡ ዘእግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ወላዲተ፡ አምላክ፡
A Third Prayer for the Departed
The Longest Prayers of Repentance, ጸሎተ፡ ንስሐ፡ ዓቢይ፡
The Seven Benedictions of Abba Samuel, ጸሎተ፡ ቡራኬ፡ ዘአቡነ፡ ሳሙኤል፡
Homily of Abba Sälama, Bishop of Ethiopia, to be read for all the Dead, ድርሳን፡ ዘቅዱስ፡ ወብፁዕ፡ አባ፡ ሰላማ፡ ዘብሔረ፡ ኢትዮጵያ፡
